figures.caption: Fig. 2. NASA-TLX workload comparison (lower is better).

Fig. 1. Overview of IMPACT-CYCLE. Starting from keyframe-grounded scene graphs, the system decomposes graph elements into typed atomic claims and instantiates structured verification probes. Three verification agents—local grounding, temporal consistency, and global semantic audit—provide complementary evidence over a shared, revisable semantic memory. Their outputs are fused by the Arbitration Agent; unresolved conflicts are escalated to the human supervisor, whose edits trigger dependency-closure re-verification rather than a full pipeline rerun.
